question.en: A sales staff member recently left a laptop at a hotel and needs a new one immediately. After remotely wiping the old laptop, a support technician prepares to take a new laptop out of inventory to begin the deployment process. Which of the following should the technician do FIRST?

question.en: A user calls the IT help desk and explains that all the data on the user's computer is encrypted.
